parameters.content: Telegram Trigger polling is the selected entry mode. If converted to Webhook mode, validate X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token before any MySQL or ElevenLabs node.
Load active user, ensure session, load session and agents, then collapse MySQL multi-row output into one context item.
Route /start, /menu, /cancel, callback actions, agent selection, pending text, unsupported payloads, and fallback inputs.
Every callback uses internal voice_agents.id and is re-authorized against the current Telegram user before session writes or ElevenLabs calls.
GET + merge + PATCH conversation_config.agent.prompt.prompt. HTTP nodes use full response and Never Error.
GET + merge + PATCH conversation_config.agent.first_message. HTTP nodes use full response and Never Error.
Create text KB document, GET agent, append to knowledge_base, PATCH agent, and persist orphan row if attach fails.
Telegram user-facing responses are explicit. Database failures that still have chat_id send Temporary database error. Please try again later.
Session state is per Telegram user. Rapid same-user messages may race; the MVP re-reads user_sessions at execution start and keeps cancel/update completion idempotent. No locks are used.

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry mode selected: Telegram Trigger polling.

nodes.name: Normalize Telegram Update
nodes.notes: Normalizes message and callback_query payloads into consistent workflow fields.

nodes.name: Has Valid Telegram Context
nodes.notes: If telegram_user_id or chat_id is missing, stop before MySQL, Telegram, or ElevenLabs.

nodes.name: Load Active Telegram User

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM telegram_users
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND is_active = TRUE;

nodes.notes:
Loads current active Telegram user.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($json.telegram_user_id)] }}

nodes.name: Has Active User
nodes.notes: No rows -> No voice agents are linked to your Telegram account.

nodes.name: Ensure User Session
nodes.notes:
Ensures every active user has one session row.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Load Active Telegram User"].json.id)] }}

nodes.name: Load User Session
nodes.notes:
Loads selected agent and pending action before routing.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Load Active Telegram User"].json.id)] }}

nodes.name: Load User Agents

parameters.query:
SELECT va.id, va.agent_name
FROM voice_agents va
WHERE va.user_id = $1
ORDER BY va.agent_name ASC;

nodes.notes:
Loads only agents owned by the current user.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Load Active Telegram User"].json.id)] }}

nodes.name: Build Workflow Context
nodes.notes: Outputs exactly one item with normalized fields, user, session, and agents[].

nodes.name: Database Error Guard
nodes.notes: Detects local MySQL continue-on-fail outputs after initial read/upsert nodes and routes to the user-facing temporary database error.

nodes.name: Has User Agents
nodes.notes: No agents -> No voice agents are linked to your Telegram account.

nodes.name: Answer Callback Query
nodes.notes: HTTP fallback for answerCallbackQuery. Every callback route passes this pattern; configure TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN if the Telegram node cannot answer callbacks directly.

nodes.name: Route Telegram Update
nodes.notes: Routes message_text == /start, /menu, /cancel; callback_data menu/action/agent; unsupported payloads; free-form update commands; pending text; fallback main menu.

nodes.name: Route Branch
nodes.notes: Named switch for the top-level route outputs.

parameters.text: No voice agents are linked to your Telegram account.
Temporary database error. Please try again later.

nodes.name: Cancel Flow
nodes.notes:
Clears pending_action and preserves selected_voice_agent_id.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Build Agent Selection Keyboard
nodes.notes: Builds one inline button per owned agent using internal voice_agents.id.

nodes.name: Authorize Selected Agent

parameters.query:
SELECT va.*
FROM voice_agents va
JOIN telegram_users tu ON tu.id = va.user_id
WHERE tu.telegram_user_id = $1
  AND tu.is_active = TRUE
  AND va.id = $2;

nodes.notes:
Authorizes selected internal voice_agents.id against current Telegram user.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($json.telegram_user_id), Number($json.requested_voice_agent_id)] }}

nodes.name: Save Selected Agent

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_sessions
SET selected_voice_agent_id = $1,
    pending_action = NULL
WHERE user_id = $2;

nodes.notes:
Stores selected agent and clears pending action.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Authorize Selected Agent"].json.id), Number($json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Log Unauthorized Agent Selection
nodes.notes: Logs cross-user callback attempts in n8n execution output.

parameters.text: That agent is not available to your account.

nodes.name: Has Selected Agent For Action
nodes.notes: If no selected agent, respond Choose an agent first and show selection keyboard.

nodes.name: Authorize Session Agent

parameters.query:
SELECT va.*
FROM voice_agents va
JOIN telegram_users tu ON tu.id = va.user_id
WHERE tu.telegram_user_id = $1
  AND tu.is_active = TRUE
  AND va.id = $2;

nodes.notes:
Re-authorizes selected session agent before starting an action and before completing pending text.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($json.telegram_user_id), Number($json.session.selected_voice_agent_id)] }}

nodes.name: Route After Session Authorization
nodes.notes: Rebuilds the workflow context after the MySQL authorization row and chooses whether to store a new pending action or complete pending text.

nodes.name: Clear Invalid Selected Agent

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_sessions
SET selected_voice_agent_id = NULL,
    pending_action = NULL
WHERE user_id = $1;

nodes.notes:
Clears selected agent and pending action when selected agent is deleted or no longer owned.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($json.user.id)] }}

parameters.text: That agent is no longer available. Choose another agent.

nodes.name: Store Pending Action
nodes.notes:
Stores whitelisted pending action only.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [$json.requested_action, Number($json.user.id)] }}

parameters.text: Send plain text for this update.

nodes.name: Is Valid Update Text
nodes.notes: Invalid empty/too-long/URL-like text keeps pending_action so the user can retry.

nodes.name: Get ElevenLabs Agent For Prompt Merge
nodes.notes:
Read current agent config before prompt merge.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Map ElevenLabs Error
nodes.notes: Shared mapper logic after ElevenLabs operations. This instance handles prompt GET.

nodes.name: Merge Prompt Update
nodes.notes: Merges update_text into conversation_config.agent.prompt.prompt.

nodes.name: Patch ElevenLabs Prompt
nodes.notes:
Patches merged prompt conversation_config.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Get ElevenLabs Agent For Welcome Merge
nodes.notes:
Read current agent config before welcome merge.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Merge Welcome Message Update
nodes.notes: Merges update_text into conversation_config.agent.first_message.

nodes.name: Patch ElevenLabs Welcome Message
nodes.notes:
Patches merged welcome message conversation_config.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document
nodes.notes:
Creates text knowledge-base document before attachment.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Get ElevenLabs Agent For Knowledge Merge
nodes.notes:
Reads current agent config before appending knowledge-base document.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Merge Knowledge Base Document
nodes.notes: Appends created document to conversation_config.agent.prompt.knowledge_base while preserving existing entries.

nodes.name: Patch ElevenLabs Knowledge Base
nodes.notes:
Patches merged knowledge-base list.
Enable full response/status/headers and Never Error. Configure httpHeaderAuth so it sends xi-api-key.

nodes.name: Clear Pending Action
nodes.notes:
Clears pending action after successful prompt update.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Clear Pending Welcome Action
nodes.notes:
Clears pending action after successful welcome update.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Clear Pending Knowledge Action
nodes.notes:
Clears pending action after successful knowledge-base update.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Cleanup Mapped ElevenLabs Session

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_sessions
SET selected_voice_agent_id = CASE WHEN $1 THEN NULL ELSE selected_voice_agent_id END,
    pending_action = CASE WHEN $2 THEN NULL ELSE pending_action END
WHERE user_id = $3;

nodes.notes:
Applies mapped cleanup for 404 and auth failures. 429 and 422 keep pending_action.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [Boolean($json.clear_selected_agent), Boolean($json.clear_pending_action), Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id)] }}

nodes.name: Insert Knowledge Orphan Document

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kb_orphan_documents (
  user_id,
  voice_agent_id,
  elevenlabs_agent_id,
  elevenlabs_document_id,
  document_name,
  failure_status_code,
  failure_response_json
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, CAST($7 AS JSON));

options.queryParameters:
={{ [
  Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id),
  Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.session.selected_voice_agent_id),
  $node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.elevenlabs_agent_id,
  $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.body?.id || $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.id,
  $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.body?.name || $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.name,
  Number($json.elevenlabs_status),
  JSON.stringify($json.elevenlabs_response_body || {})
] }}

nodes.notes:
Records created knowledge-base document if later attachment PATCH fails.
Use Query Parameters, not raw expression interpolation. Query Parameters: ={{ [
  Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.user.id),
  Number($node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.session.selected_voice_agent_id),
  $node["Route After Session Authorization"].json.elevenlabs_agent_id,
  $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.body?.id || $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.id,
  $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.body?.name || $node["Create ElevenLabs Knowledge Text Document"].json.name,
  Number($json.elevenlabs_status),
  JSON.stringify($json.elevenlabs_response_body || {})
] }}

parameters.text: Knowledge document created but could not be attached. Please try the update again or contact support.

nodes.name: Parse Freeform Command
nodes.notes: Parses simple natural-language update commands such as: update my agent to answer Hello world.

nodes.name: Freeform Command Branch
nodes.notes: Valid parsed commands continue through the same Authorize Session Agent path used by menu-driven updates.

main.node: Get ElevenLabs Agent For Prompt Merge
Get ElevenLabs Agent For Welcome Merge
Get ElevenLabs Agent For Knowledge Merge
